channel.title: Join CEDIS on CEDIS
channel.description: Entry paths for research, supervision, and collaboration at CEDIS/UnB.

item.title: Institutional partnerships
item.description: Path for institutions that want to collaborate with CEDIS in research, development, and innovation.

item.title: Master's
item.description: Master’s path in Applied Computing focused on applied research and technological output.

item.title: Outreach and volunteering
item.description: Participation in outreach, volunteering, and applied development with social impact.

item.title: PhD
item.description: PhD in Applied Computing with scientific depth and applied impact.

item.title: Propose a project
item.description: Channel for suggesting new research, development, innovation, or outreach projects with CEDIS.

item.title: Undergraduate Research
item.description: The main entry path for undergraduate students who want to start researching at CEDIS.

item.title: Undergraduate Thesis
item.description: Path for developing an undergraduate thesis linked to active CEDIS projects.
